excerpt.rendered: A free, modern Workbench-compatible OS. Boots in our pulldown screen.

content.rendered:
AROS Vision is a curated m68k distribution of AROS, the open-source AmigaOS-compatible operating system. It ships with a Workbench-style desktop, sensible defaults, and a stack of bundled freeware.

For this project we use it as the OS image inside our SAE pulldown screen. Click Power, give it a second to mount DH0:, and you get a real Workbench session in a browser tab.
